allow: Bash(cd "C:/Users/wakaw/Documents/DEV/repos/tazieff-eps" && npx sharp-cli -i public/media/anatomy-bg.png -o public/media/anatomy-bg.webp --quality 82 2>&1 || node -e "const sharp = require\('sharp'\); sharp\('public/media/anatomy-bg.png'\).webp\({quality:82}\).toFile\('public/media/anatomy-bg.webp'\).then\(i => console.log\('Done:', \(i.size/1024\).toFixed\(0\)+'KB'\)\)" 2>&1)
Bash(npx @gltf-transform/cli inspect public/models/muscles.glb 2>/dev/null | sed 's/\\x1b\\[[0-9;]*m//g' | grep -oP '│\\s+\\d+\\s+│\\s+\\K[^│]+\(?=\\s+│\\s+TRIANGLES\)' | sed 's/\\s*$//')
Bash(npx @gltf-transform/cli inspect public/models/muscles_manquants.glb 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '│ \\d+ +│ \(.+?\) +│ TRIANGLES' | sed 's/│ [0-9]* *│ //;s/ *│ TRIANGLES//')

Bash(npx @gltf-transform/cli inspect public/models/silhouette_fixed.glb 2>/dev/null | grep -oP '│ \\d+ +│ \(.+?\) +│ TRIANGLES' | sed 's/│ [0-9]* *│ //;s/ *│ TRIANGLES//')
